name: Cheesy Grilled Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 3 russet potatoes, each cut into 8, lengthwise
1 cup shredded cheddar cheese or Colby-Jack cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the potato wedges, onion, olive oil, parsley, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
2. Place the mixture in a foil broiler pan in a single layer.
3. Cover with another sheet of foil to form a packet. Reinforce the sealed edge of the packet with more foil.
4. Place the packet on the grill over medium heat. Cook for 40 to 50 minutes, or until tender, shaking the packet periodically and turning it upside down halfway through grilling.
5. Remove the cover and top with cheese. Replace the cover and cook for an additional 3 to 4 minutes, or until the cheese melts.
6. Note: To make a broiler pan packet, invert one broiler pan over the filled broiler pan, overlapping slightly. Fold the top of one short end down to seal it, and fold the bottom of the other end to seal it as well.
7. Makes 4 servings.
